name: 渣男×清潔工女主（恩將仇報）
name_en: Scumbag Ex × Disguised Heroine (Betrayal of Kindness)
description: 女主為愛隱藏身份三年幫助渣男上位，渣男卻嫌棄她是清潔工並出軌。這個組合製造了觀眾最強烈的憤怒感和復仇期待。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Three whole years. I went from being someone who didn't even lift a finger to now my hands are covered in cuts and scars. Jerk. How could you do this to me. / She pretended to be a cleaning lady to help him become Jing B's new king.
examples.context: 女主為愛隱藏身份三年幫助渣男上位，渣男卻嫌棄她是清潔工並出軌。這個組合製造了觀眾最強烈的憤怒感和復仇期待。
